2604.13283.title: Optimizing Earth Observation Satellite Schedules under Unknown Operational Constraints: An Active Constraint Acquisition Approach
2604.13283.paper_summary: Earth Observation (EO) satellite scheduling (deciding which imaging tasks to perform and when) is a well-studied combinatorial optimization problem. Existing methods typically assume that the operational constraint model is fully specified in advance. In practice, however, constraints governing separation between observations, power budgets, and thermal limits are often embedded in engineering artefacts or high-fidelity simulators rather than in explicit mathematical models. We study EO scheduling under \emph{unknown constraints}: the objective is known, but feasibility must be learned interactively from a binary oracle. Working with a simplified model restricted to pairwise separation and global capacity constraints, we introduce Conservative Constraint Acquisition~(CCA), a domain-specific procedure designed to identify justified constraints efficiently in practice while limiting unnecessary tightening of the learned model. Embedded in the \textsc{Learn\&Optimize} framework, CCA supports an interactive search process that alternates optimization under a learned constraint model with targeted oracle queries. On synthetic instances with up to 50~tasks and dense constraint networks, L\&O improves over a no-knowledge greedy baseline and uses far fewer main oracle queries than a two-phase acquire-then-solve baseline (FAO). For $n\leq 30$, the average gap drops from 65--68\% (Priority Greedy) to 17.7--35.8\% using L\&O. At $n{=}50$, where the CP-SAT reference is the best feasible solution found in 120~s, L\&O improves on FAO on average (17.9\% vs.\ 20.3\%) while using 21.3 main queries instead of 100 and about $5\times$ less execution time.
2604.13283.paper_summary_zh: 地球觀測（EO）衛星排程（決定執行哪些成像任務及何時執行）是一個研究已久的組合優化問題。現有的方法通常假設操作約束模型在事前已完全指定。然而，在實際操作中，控制觀測之間分隔、功率預算和熱限制的約束往往嵌入在工程文檔或高保真模擬器中，而不是在明確的數學模型中。我們研究在\emph{未知約束}下的EO排程：目標是已知的，但可行性必須通過與二元神諭的互動學習來獲得。在一個簡化模型中，限制在成對分隔和全局容量約束，我們引入了保守約束獲取（CCA），這是一種特定於領域的程序，旨在有效識別合理的約束，同時限制學習模型的不必要收緊。CCA嵌入在\textsc{Learn\&Optimize}框架中，支持一個互動搜索過程，該過程在學習的約束模型下進行優化，並與針對性的神諭查詢交替進行。在最多有50個任務和密集約束網絡的合成實例中，L\&O在無知貪婪基線上有所改善，並且使用的主要神諭查詢比兩階段的獲取然後解決基線（FAO）少得多。對於$n\leq 30$，平均差距從65--68\%（優先貪婪）下降到17.7--35.8\%，使用L\&O。在$n{=}50$的情況下，CP-SAT參考是120秒內找到的最佳可行解，L\&O在FAO上平均改善（17.9\%對20.3\%），同時使用21.3個主要查詢而不是100個，執行時間約少了$5\times$。
2604.13283.author: Mohamed-Bachir Belaid et.al.
